***Career Objective:***

Experienced web developer with 6+ years in JavaScript, ReactJS, Node.js, PHP, WordPress themes. Skilled in NoSQL/MySQL databases, Tailwind CSS for responsive UIs. Committed to clean code, robust architecture for project scalability and success

***Career Summary:***

I am an adept web developer with over 5 years of hands-on experience in JavaScript, ReactJS, Nodejs, and PHP, complemented by proficiency in WordPress theme development My expertise extends to database management, encompassing both NoSQL and MySQL I\`\`m well-versed in modern frontend frameworks like Tailwind CSS, enabling me to create visually appealing and responsive web interfaces My dedication to clean code and robust architecture ensures scalability and long-term project success

***Special Qualification:***

Web developer with strong problem-solving, adaptability, and user-centric design skills A collaborative team player focused on quality assurance and staying current with industry trends Committed to client-centric success in every project'
